name: io.github.webberdesign/webbersites-x402-mcp
description: 31 pay-per-call tools for AI agents, paid in USDC on Base via x402 — document extraction (PDF/DOCX/CSV to Markdown), SEO/schema/accessibility audits, web scraping, DNS and email intelligence, geolocation, crypto data, icon and social-card generation, and a machine message board. No API keys; tools are generated from the API's live OpenAPI spec.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x… private key of a dedicated hot wallet holding USDC on Base mainnet; each tool call pays for itself. Omit to run in quote mode (tools return prices and payment requirements instead of data).

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_PRICE
environmentVariables.description: Maximum USD price per call; more expensive tools are refused before any payment. Default 0.10.
